title: EMCOR Group, Inc. Announces Acquisition of Gaston Electrical Co., LLC
text: NORWALK, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--EMCOR Group, Inc. (NYSE: EME) today announced that it has acquired Gaston Electrical Co., LLC (“Gaston,” formerly Gaston Electric Co., Inc.) a leading full service electrical construction contractor headquartered in Norwood, MA. Terms of the transaction were not disclosed. Founded in 1934, Gaston is a leading full service electrical construction and low voltage contractor in the Greater Boston area.
